name: splice-fast
description: Fastest experiment loop: copy hot expert layers from a Q4 donor GGUF into the IQ2 base — minutes, no requantization
_note: `forgequant.py splice splice-fast` — pure tensor copy from donor to base (base defaults to the template). Use it to TEST which layers deserve a boost before paying for a full requantize; layers 'auto:6' resolves against the imatrix, or set e.g. "37-42". Donor and base must come from the same template family.
